claims.claim_text: Governor Newsom’s decision to force state employees back to the office is harmful and counterproductive.
The return to office mandate undermines the state’s efforts to meet its climate goals.
The return to office mandate negatively impacts the state’s budget deficit.
State agencies have praised telework policies and the enhanced productivity they provide.
Telework can reduce the state’s office footprint and provide substantial budgetary savings.
Telework policies have eliminated nearly 400,000 metric tons of carbon emissions.
Telework policies have reduced traffic congestion.
Telework has saved workers hundreds of dollars per month in vehicle expenses.
